title: Sippin
lyrics: If you're sippin' baby, I'm sippin' with you all night Yeah, all night long I said, if you're sippin' baby, I'm sippin' with you all night Yeah, all night long If you're sippin' baby, I'll take the drink in front of you Splash it on and put it back up, I got you now Cut a little molly out the tube Get a little light in the room Huh, cottonmouth, cottonmouth, yeah Hit that one rock up to the one Hit the club and know that it's just from the jump Sip a little bit, sip a little crib Get a little round around, get the diggy on the dick Can you understand? Get love around, wanna get it on the weed Now you understand me, that If you're sippin' baby, I'm sippin' with you all night Yeah, all night long I said, if you're sippin' baby, I'm sippin' with you all night Yeah, all night long If you take that sip, I'll go down, don't flip There's enough place for us to even hang And I can get some verse and correlate Correlate the way that I get fucked up inside my mind And I'm like, sip this, no wrong drink And I don't know if we can raise Pass the down way, pass the hard way Pass the down, we'll spiral to always But you look so good tonight, I don't give a fuck If it's the wrong way you're looking to do Oh, yeah, I said, if you're sippin' baby, I'm sippin' with you all night Yeah, all night long I said, if you're sippin' baby, I'm sippin' with you all night Yeah, all night long If you're sippin' baby, now I'm sippin' with you all night Yeah, all night long If you're sippin' baby, you look so good Yeah, do it all night long Break it down and drop it down And pop me up in a different fantasy reality That got you standing next to me If you're sippin' baby, then I'm sippin' all night long Yeah, all night long Thanks for watching!
